case_title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. SUMMER LEA SIMPSON ET AL

ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO KEITH HENRY ARMSTRONG ON 7/27/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURNED FOR BETTER ADDRESS."

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIAO ZHEN

REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF XIAO ZHEN WU. DEFENDANT SUMMER LEA SIMPSON DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT KEITH ARMSTRONG DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, XIAO ZHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMPSON, SUMMER LEA ARMSTRONG, KEITH HENRY THIS MATTER HAS BEEN RESOLVED BY WU'S UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS. WU SOUGHT ALL AMOUNTS OUTSTANDING IN CUD-17-657940 AND CANNOT RELITIGATE THE ISSUES IN THIS ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,850.74 FILED BY WU, XIAO ZHEN AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, SUMMER LEA ARMSTRONG, KEITH HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED JUN-14-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, SUMMER LEA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-06-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF XIAO ZHEN WU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY PROVISIONAL MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
